  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Unshielded flexible rubber coupling staged for underground material transition instead of a code-approved shielded transition coupling or shear ring."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the unshielded rubber coupling and replace it with a heavy-duty shielded transition coupling rated for direct burial and underground shear resistance."
  ],
  "rationale": "Unshielded flexible couplings (often called Ferncos) lack the shear resistance required for underground installations. Soil settlement and load can cause the pipes to misalign, leading to blockages, leaks, or root intrusion. Code and manufacturer listings require shielded transition couplings (or couplings with shear rings) for underground pipe transitions to maintain structural alignment.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 705 (Joints and Connections)",
    "ASTM C1173 (Standard Specification for Flexible Transition Couplings for Underground Piping Systems)",
    "Manufacturer installation instructions for underground burial"
  ]
}
